final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a cinematic still of an astronaut floating in Earth orbit with a space station structure at the frame edge.

Style/medium: photorealistic cinematic still, NASA-style documentary realism with dramatic sci-fi atmosphere
Composition: medium shot of astronaut centered, partial space station structure at right edge, Earth curvature visible below, 24mm wide-angle lens
Subject: astronaut in detailed white EVA suit with reflective visor, life-support backpack, tether cable drifting, spacesuit fabric texture visible
Scene/backdrop: low Earth orbit, blue and white Earth partially visible below, distant Milky Way and colorful nebula clouds filling the deep space background
Lighting/mood: soft blue-white Earthshine illuminating the astronaut from below, harsh shadow on suit back, stars pin-sharp, awe-inspiring vastness
Color palette: deep space black as base, warm nebula pinks and purples as accents, cool Earth blues and whites, silver-white spacesuit
Materials/textures: matte white spacesuit fabric with visible stitching and patches, reflective gold visor, metallic space station panels, fine star dust
Avoid: cartoon rendering, lens flare overuse, 8K stuffer text, deformed helmet proportions, plastic-looking suit, watermark
